title: CSE 101 — Algorithms (UCSC, Winter 2020)
description: Interactive visualizations of the data structures and algorithms from Patricia Lopez's CSE 101. The original C++ implementations live alongside in this same repo (hw1-hw4/, bst-codes/, binary-heap/, etc.); the demos in /embeds rewrite the same algorithms in TypeScript with step-by-step animation so the algorithm itself is visible — backtracking, AVL rotations, BFS expansion.

assets.title: HW2 — N-Queens Backtracker
assets.description: Place N queens on an N×N board such that no two attack each other. Watch the backtracker place queens column-by-column, with each conflict detection and unwinding step animated.

assets.title: HW3 — AVL Wordrange
assets.description: Self-balancing BST of strings. Insert words and watch the tree rotate (LL/RR/LR/RL) to maintain balance. Range queries highlight every node lexicographically between two endpoints.
